description: Verso: Receipt issued to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb for his ḍamān on dyeing in Madīnat al-Fayyūm. Dated: 21 Dhū l-Qaʿda 403 (Khan reads 26 Dhū l-Qaʿda 403). Measurements: 8.7 × 8.5 cm. Written by the jahbadh Mīkhāʾīl b. ʿAbd al-Masīḥ. Amount of payment: one-half, one-third, and one-eighth dīnār and two ḥabbas (Khan reads two, one-half, one-third and one-eighth). Other texts on the same support: The recto contains part of a letter concerning ships, a commercial partnership (ṣuḥba), and a qāḍī. It was written before the verso.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
